item.title: I Bought a Helicopter
item.description: A straightforward look at buying a helicopter, with aviation commentary and a personal storytelling angle. The video keeps the focus on the aircraft and the experience behind the purchase.

media:content.media:title: I Bought a Helicopter
media:content.media:description: A straightforward look at buying a helicopter, with aviation commentary and a personal storytelling angle. The video keeps the focus on the aircraft and the experience behind the purchase.

item.title: Can We Fix This Free Abandoned RV?
item.description: A look at whether this free abandoned RV can be repaired and brought back to use. The video follows the condition of the vehicle and the challenges involved in the process. What would you check first?

media:content.media:title: Can We Fix This Free Abandoned RV?
media:content.media:description: A look at whether this free abandoned RV can be repaired and brought back to use. The video follows the condition of the vehicle and the challenges involved in the process. What would you check first?

item.title: Marketplace Score: $100K Deal of the Year
item.description: A look at a Marketplace score tied to a $100K deal of the year. The video follows the story and reaction around the find in a clear, straightforward way. What stood out most?

media:content.media:title: Marketplace Score: $100K Deal of the Year
media:content.media:description: A look at a Marketplace score tied to a $100K deal of the year. The video follows the story and reaction around the find in a clear, straightforward way. What stood out most?

item.title: Rediscovering a 1939 Airplane After 10+ Years
item.description: An aviation restoration journey focused on revisiting a 1939 aircraft after more than a decade out of sight. The video explores its condition, history, and the challenges involved in bringing attention back to a vintage airplane. What would you restore first on an aircraft this old?

media:content.media:title: Rediscovering a 1939 Airplane After 10+ Years
media:content.media:description: An aviation restoration journey focused on revisiting a 1939 aircraft after more than a decade out of sight. The video explores its condition, history, and the challenges involved in bringing attention back to a vintage airplane. What would you restore first on an aircraft this old?

item.title: Biplane Deal of the Week
item.description: A look at this week’s biplane deal, with aviation commentary and a simple breakdown of what stands out. A straightforward update for plane fans and casual viewers alike. What do you think of this one?

media:content.media:title: Biplane Deal of the Week
media:content.media:description: A look at this week’s biplane deal, with aviation commentary and a simple breakdown of what stands out. A straightforward update for plane fans and casual viewers alike. What do you think of this one?

item.title: Acquiring Elvis Presley's Private Jet
item.description: A look at the acquisition of a historic private aircraft once associated with Elvis Presley. The video explores the aircraft’s condition, background, and aviation significance. What makes celebrity-owned aircraft so interesting to collectors?

media:content.media:title: Acquiring Elvis Presley's Private Jet
media:content.media:description: A look at the acquisition of a historic private aircraft once associated with Elvis Presley. The video explores the aircraft’s condition, background, and aviation significance. What makes celebrity-owned aircraft so interesting to collectors?

item.title: 2,841-Mile Flight Took Its Toll
item.description: A long-distance flight leads to wear, fatigue, and unexpected challenges along the way. The video follows the experience and the impact such a journey can have on both aircraft and pilot. What’s the longest trip you’ve ever taken?

media:content.media:title: 2,841-Mile Flight Took Its Toll
media:content.media:description: A long-distance flight leads to wear, fatigue, and unexpected challenges along the way. The video follows the experience and the impact such a journey can have on both aircraft and pilot. What’s the longest trip you’ve ever taken?
